In the Name of Jesus, I break and dissolve all patterns of family disputes and property conflicts. put a stop to all bickering, hatred, anger, violence, jealousy, deceit, competition, and unforgiveness among the members of the family.

Lord Jesus, we ask that your peace and love flow to all the members of the family. We ask for mutual forgiveness, love, and support for each other. Lord, heal all broken relationships. We ask for your love and peace to reign in our families and homes.
